No load test before lifting (should apply 3:3:3)
No emergency response procedures for work

near_duplicates.b: Standing on handrails to work or working in unsafety position

near_duplicates.b: Wearing safety harness but not hooking

near_duplicates.b: The crane is operating in the rain, Wind is than level 5

filtered_out_admin: Contact list is blurred, missing information, damaged…
Crane driver doesn't have Group 3 safety card or other document
Excavator drivers don't have a Group 3 safety card
Excavators do not have a checklist
MOS when digging deeper than 2m are not inspected
No PTW or approval for work in shafts/pipelines/pressure testing/X-rays/Confined spaces
No Safety instructions for electrical equipment
No air testing and periodic testing every 30 minutes (Oxygen from 19.5% to 23.5%)
No checklist or checklist not good for the first aid cabinet/bag
No declaration of equipment with occupational safety requirements
No documents: Inspection drawing, Inspection, QA-QC…
No electrical safety inspection record for machinery and equipment
No emergency response equipment available at the workplace
No emergency response procedures for chemical spills
No emergency response procedures for work
No entry and exit record or not fully updated
No fire drills performed or inadequate fire drills
No fire prevention team assigned or not up to date
No information of the PIC on the electrical panel
No layout of temporary electrical system
No parking area sign board (including temporary parking areas)
No periodic electrical cabinet safety inspection form
No safety net for floor by floor (minimum 3 floor/1 Safety net)
No single-line or tagname for wire
No warning signs for transfomer area
Worker eat and drink at the workplace, causing unhygienic conditions /Công nhân ăn uống tại nơi làm việc gây mất vệ sinh
filtered_out_behavioral: Breaks not maintained as regulated (should be 15 minutes break every hour)
Bringing or drinking alcohol at site
Do not arbitrarily connect or install socket inside the electrical panel
Do not hang heavy objects on the ladder
Do not stand on the top of the ladder (sitting only)
Do not use single-layer insulated wire (must be 2 layers)
Do not using bamboo and wooden ladder
Eating and drinking at the wrong place, do not eat or drink on the site
Entering a prohibited area
Ladder must not be connected together to make them longer
Ladders are not used according to the design
Ladders are placed too close to power lines
Let the other holding on vehicles
No people is holding the foot of the ladder
No warning area
No wear safety harness when working on a ladder that is 2m high
Only charge batteries in controlled places with low risk of fire explosion
Only one person is allowed to work on the ladder
Place ladder on crate, cart, table, or other unstable surfaces
Smoking in the wrong place
The top of the ladder must not be at least 900mm above the floor
Throw material, equipment
Throwing materials/equipment
Urinating, defecating in undesigned place
Use ladder on scaffolding or lifting equipment to increase working height
Using a phone while walking (phone use is only allowed when standing still in a safe place/ Sử dụng điện thoại khi đang di chuyển (chỉ được sử dụng điện thoại khi đứng lại tại nơi đảm bảo an toàn)
Worker engaging in threatening or disruptive behavior at the workplace
Worker fighting at the workplace
Worker threatening or fighting supervisors
Worker work alone
Worker working alone (must be 2 people or more)
Workers resting at the workplace (resting is only allowed in designated areas)
